inputs.label: Distance (km)
inputs.businessContext: Total distance traveled by the vehicle.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total distance traveled by the vehicle.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Distance totale parcourue par le véhicule.
businessContext_i18n.es: Distancia total recorrida por el vehículo.

inputs.label: Fuel Consumption Rate
inputs.businessContext: Average fuel consumption per 100 km (e.g., 8 L/100km for a mid-size car).

businessContext_i18n.en: Average fuel consumption per 100 km (e.g., 8 L/100km for a mid-size car).
businessContext_i18n.tr: 100 km başına ortalama yakıt tüketimi (örneğin, orta boy bir araba için 8 L/100 km).
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittlicher Kraftstoffverbrauch pro 100 km (z. B. 8 L/100 km für einen Mittelklassewagen).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Consommation moyenne de carburant aux 100 km (ex. : 8 L/100 km pour une voiture moyenne).
businessContext_i18n.es: Consumo medio de combustible cada 100 km (ej., 8 L/100km para un coche mediano).
businessContext_i18n.ar: متوسط استهلاك الوقود لكل 100 كم (مثل 8 لتر/100 كم لسيارة متوسطة الحجم).

inputs.label: Fuel Emission Factor
inputs.businessContext: CO₂ emissions per liter of fuel burned. For diesel ~2.68 kg/L, gasoline ~2.31 kg/L.

businessContext_i18n.en: CO₂ emissions per liter of fuel burned. For diesel ~2.68 kg/L, gasoline ~2.31 kg/L.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yakılan litre başına CO₂ emisyonu. Dizel için ~2,68 kg/L, benzin için ~2,31 kg/L.
businessContext_i18n.de: CO₂-Emissionen pro Liter verbranntem Kraftstoff. Für Diesel ~2,68 kg/L, Benzin ~2,31 kg/L.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Émissions de CO₂ par litre de carburant brûlé. Pour le diesel ~2,68 kg/L, l'essence ~2,31 kg/L.
businessContext_i18n.es: Emisiones de CO₂ por litro de combustible quemado. Para diésel ~2.68 kg/L, gasolina ~2.31 kg/L.
businessContext_i18n.ar: انبعاثات ثاني أكسيد الكربون لكل لتر وقود محروق. للديزل ~2.68 كجم/لتر، للبنزين ~2.31 كجم/لتر.

inputs.label: Number of Trips or Vehicles
inputs.businessContext: Number of identical trips or vehicles to scale total emissions.

label_i18n.fr: Nombre de trajets ou de véhicules

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of identical trips or vehicles to scale total emissions.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Toplam emisyonları ölçeklendirmek için aynı sefer veya araç sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl identischer Fahrten oder Fahrzeuge zur Skalierung der Gesamtemissionen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de trajets ou de véhicules identiques pour mettre à l'échelle les émissions totales.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de viajes o vehículos idénticos para escalar las emisiones totales.
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد الرحلات أو المركبات المتطابقة لقياس إجمالي الانبعاثات.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
